name: Oriental Chicken Pita
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups cooked white chicken meat, chopped
1/2 cup canned crushed unsweetened pineapple, drained
1/3 cup canned chopped water chestnuts, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the chicken, pineapple, celery, water chestnuts, and green pepper.
2. In a small bowl, mix together the peanut butter, teriyaki sauce, lemon juice, ginger, onion powder, and dry mustard to form a dressing.
3. Mix the peanut butter dressing into the chicken salad.
4. Split each pita round in half and place one lettuce leaf on the bottom of each half.
5. Fill each pita pocket with alfalfa sprouts and the chicken salad.
6. Makes 4 servings.
Joyce R. 1/99
